title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 15 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 15 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 15 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.58 % today, the main contract closed at 740.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is better.PBF at Shandong port deal 830-835yuan/mt,increase 2-7 yuan/mt. PBF at Tangshan port deal 840 yuan/mt. Today's MLF interest rate cut has released a positive signal, which helps to enhance market confidence.
